description_long: This house features a rectangular, multi-unit structure with a mix of dark gray, white, and stone-textured facades, giving it a contemporary yet classic urban appearance. The front elevation showcases symmetrical window arrangements, arched double doors, and a paved entryway, while the rear includes garage doors and additional access points. The building is two stories tall, with flat roofs and open courtyards visible from above, suggesting shared or multi-family occupancy. Large, evenly spaced windows dominate the exterior, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. Landscaping elements, such as a tree and paved walkways, are present near the main entrance, enhancing curb appeal. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, suitable for upscale urban neighborhoods.
description: A two-story, multi-unit house with flat roofs, symmetrical windows, and a mix of dark gray, white, and stone facades. Features include arched entry doors, garage access, and landscaped entryways.
description_view_0: Front view showing symmetrical windows, arched double doors, and a mix of stone and dark gray facades.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white facade, paved driveway, and a large tree near the entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying garage doors, additional windows, and a broad paved area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible garage doors, flat roofs, and open courtyards.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched double doors with a paved entry, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
